title: Sinyal di Rak Nomor Tiga
theme: Menjelajahi misteri kecil di balik rutinitas sehari-hari seorang pelanggan, Risa menemukan kedamaian dalam pengamatan dan refleksi terhadap kehidupan tersembunyi orang lain.

cover.prompt: Interior of a 24-hour convenience store at 02:13 AM. A lone customer's presence is indicated by a subtle silhouette near a product display, softly illuminated by the ambient glow of the store's overhead lighting and product displays. The composition emphasizes the quiet vastness of the aisles receding into a gentle blur, employing the rule of thirds. A digital clock, prominently positioned on a wall, clearly displays 02:13. The overall mood is one of quiet routine and thoughtful contemplation, suggesting the gentle passage of time. Focus on environmental details and the interplay of light and subtle forms.
cover.style: Cinematic photography, shallow depth of field, warm color grading

meta.plan_summary: Risa, a 24-hour minimarket cashier, observes an elderly customer with a peculiar routine, noticing a hidden note in his purchases. This leads her to discover a cryptic code, but she eventually realizes it might be a personal message not meant for her, finding peace in observation rather than a dramatic resolution.
